items.name: RFD-Classification-Machine-Learning-Project
items.description: RFD Classification Machine Learning project developed using Python and Jupyter Notebook. This project includes data preprocessing, exploratory data analysis, feature engineering, and implementation of multiple classification algorithms such as Logistic Regression, Random Forest, SVM, KNN, and Naive Bayes for prediction and accuracy evaluation.
